name: run_monocle3_pseudotime
description: Infer single-cell pseudotime with Monocle3 (Cao 2019, Trapnell lab): build a cell_data_set from raw counts and run the standard preprocess -> UMAP -> cluster_cells -> learn_graph -> order_cells pipeline, returning each cell's pseudotime along a learned principal graph (with branches/loops) — unlike Slingshot, Monocle3 learns its own graph rather than ordering preset clusters. Specify the trajectory root with root_cluster (+ cluster_key) or explicit root_cells. Input is a server-accessible .h5ad of RAW counts.

adata_path.description: Server-accessible path to an .h5ad AnnData of RAW counts (Monocle3 normalizes internally).

counts_layer.description: layers key holding raw counts if .X is not raw (optional; default: use .X).

cluster_key.description: obs column with input cluster labels; required when rooting via root_cluster, and enables per-cluster mean pseudotime.

root_cluster.description: Name of the input cluster (in cluster_key) whose cells are the trajectory root.

root_cells.description: Explicit root cell ids (obs_names); alternative to root_cluster.

n_unreachable.description: Cells disconnected from the root (pseudotime null).

pseudotime.description: Per-cell pseudotime along the learned graph (null where unreachable); omitted if n_cells > 50000.

cell_ids.description: obs_names aligned with pseudotime (omitted if n_cells > 50000).

monocle_partitions.description: Monocle3 partition assignment per cell (omitted if n_cells > 50000).

error.description: Error description if the run failed.
